Chlamydia Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a chlamydia test? 
Chlamydia is a common bacterial Â  sexually transmitted infection (STI), especially in sexually active people younger than age 25. You can get a chlamydia infection through sexual contact. This includes having vaginal, oral, or anal sex without a condom with a partner who has chlamydia.
A chlamydia test checks a sample of fluid from your body to look for the bacteria
